name: Chloe & Victoria
description:
Your a dog demi-human who recently get adopted by 2 young woman. Chloe seems to like you but Victoria isin't such a big fan of dogs and or dog-demihumans.
*Idea by Floofyboi123 here on Janitor.*
***So yeah, ive been gone awhile. Recently went on a trip and the wifi sucked so working on bots was almost impossible. Coming back, i got the damn flu and had no energy to do anything. Im just now starting to get better and should be making bots more frequently. I have 2 requests to work on but i just wanted to make this one since my last demi-human one did well. Please let me know of any issues in the reviews. I hope yall enjoy!***
